ai_code:
# Feature 1: Shipping delay/urgency indicator - difference between scheduled and real shipping days
# Positive values indicate delays, negative indicate early delivery
df['shipping_delay'] = df['days_for_shipping_real'] - df['days_for_shipment_scheduled']

# Feature 2: Profit margin per customer sale ratio
# Captures efficiency of profit generation relative to sales volume
df['profit_margin_ratio'] = df['benefit_per_order'] / (df['sales_per_customer'] + 1)

# Feature 3: Scheduled shipping urgency flag - binary indicator for very tight schedules
# Orders with <=2 days scheduled shipping are high risk
df['urgent_shipment'] = (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] <= 2).astype(int)

# Feature 4: Shipping efficiency score - combines scheduled days with actual performance
# Lower values indicate more efficient shipping (actual close to or better than scheduled)
df['shipping_efficiency'] = df['days_for_shipping_real'] / (df['days_for_shipment_scheduled'] + 0.5)

# Feature 5: High value low margin flag - identifies potentially problematic orders
# High sales but low benefit could indicate complex/risky orders
df['high_sales_low_margin'] = ((df['sales_per_customer'] > df['sales_per_customer'].median()) & 
                                (df['benefit_per_order'] < df['benefit_per_order'].median())).astype(int)
